$notes.variantShredding_unreleased: variantShredding is referenced in PROTOCOL.md only as a forward reference ('will be introduced later as a separate variantShredding table feature'). It is not yet ratified. variantShredding-preview is the only currently available name; cases for it record observed behavior.

cases.name: variant_shredding_preview_create_table_3_7_without_variant_type_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[variantShredding-preview] table without variantType in the feature lists fails; the RFC requires variantType in both readerFeatures and writerFeatures as a prerequisite for variantShredding.

cases.name: variant_shredding_preview_create_table_3_7_with_variant_type_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[variantType, variantShredding-preview] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_shredding_preview_read_snapshot_3_7_with_variant_type_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[variantType, variantShredding-preview] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_shredding_preview_create_table_3_7_with_variant_type_preview_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[variantType-preview, variantShredding-preview] table with a variant column succeeds.
